sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97622" key="sugkatagomfo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκατα-γομφόω</orth>, <sense id="n97622.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nail together, join together</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.426b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
